description: Condition: Used - like new. Think we have all pieces - basically brand new, kids never quite took to it.

expected.visit_summary_must_convey: Worth a trip if you confirm price, completeness, and condition with the seller first
must_include_reason_themes: real home photo matches like new condition described in text
seller includes amazon or retail screenshot with price and product details
text and photos align on the same robud workbench product
listing feels authentic and straightforward from a credible seller
enough product context to decide trip worthiness despite brief seller text
should_ask_seller: what age is this toy good for
do you have a link to the original listing handy
must_not_include: proximity or meetup location as grading signal
grading as Avoid despite strong listing materials

notes.photo_signal: Photo 1: real home shot of Robud wooden workbench beside bookshelves; looks like-new. Photo 2: Amazon product page screenshot showing $66.99 list price, 4.6 stars, and full product title.
notes.why_this_grade: Text-photo match is strong; seller smartly pairs a believable real photo with the original Amazon listing for price and specs. Brief text is offset by retail screenshot — straightforward lister, condition matches visuals. Trip-worthy with standard confirmation questions.
notes.pm_note: Brief seller text plus retail screenshot is a positive pattern — distinct from sparse listing with no price or product context.
